title: Inventory deforestation and biodiversity data sources for Amazon basin
outcome: A dated source inventory separating deforestation monitoring, species occurrence, range maps, and unusable sources.
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, license, geographic grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Verify satellite-based deforestation detection against PRODES reference
outcome: A verification report comparing GLAD and other satellite-based deforestation alerts to PRODES reference data, with commission error, omission error, and spatial accuracy statistics.
validation_method: Replicator reruns verification on independent time period and confirms error statistics within reported tolerance.
done_condition: Verification includes commission error, omission error, and spatial accuracy at state scale with replication confirmed.

title: Estimate species-range loss from verified deforestation data
outcome: A species-range loss analysis intersecting verified deforestation data with IUCN range maps and GBIF occurrence data, ranked by proportion of range lost with uncertainty bounds.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with species-range loss ranking.
validation_method: Replicator reruns range-loss estimation with independent occurrence data subset and confirms ranking within reported uncertainty.
done_condition: Range-loss ranking includes uncertainty bounds, species with fewer than 10 occurrence records flagged, and replication confirmed.

title: Analyze conservation prioritization implications of range-loss data
outcome: An analysis of how range-loss rankings interact with existing protected-area boundaries, indigenous territories, and recent deforestation fronts to identify conservation gaps.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with conservation gap analysis.
validation_method: Replicator confirms that gap analysis does not conflate correlation with causation and includes explicit non-use cases.
done_condition: Gap analysis includes explicit non-conservation-recommendation caveats and avoids naming specific unprotected areas as conservation priorities.

title: Red-team overstated extinction-risk and deforestation claims
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying where species-range loss analysis could overstate extinction risk, misrepresent deforestation trends, or justify harmful land-use policies.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every extinction-risk or prioritization claim is either blocked, softened to uncertainty-qualified language, or gated behind replicated review.

title: Check whether outputs match conservation decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether deforestation and species-risk outputs would change any real conservation decision responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user, named decision, explicit safeguards against indigenous displacement, and replicated field-reality review before publication.
